title: NLP Learning Resource Progression
description: A flowchart showing the suggested path and dependencies for learning Natural Language Processing resources in Semester VI, Module 5.
elements: Online Courses & Tutorials (e.g., Coursera NLP Specialization)
Practical Toolkits (e.g., NLTK, spaCy, Hugging Face)
relationships: Foundational Texts provide the core theory needed for Online Courses
Online Courses build practical skills to understand Research Papers
Research Papers expose advanced concepts implemented in Practical Toolkits
Mastery of all elements enables a successful Capstone Project
